description: Small deterministic watchlist for local Watchlist Research Agent v0 dry runs.

tickers.watch_reason: Monitor AI infrastructure spending, Azure demand, and operating margin commentary.

changes.summary: Sample fixture notes continued investor focus on AI capacity spending and Azure growth commentary.
changes.why_it_may_matter: AI capacity spending can affect growth expectations, margins, and free cash flow timing.
changes.evidence_text: Use company earnings materials, filings, and call transcript to verify current Azure and AI capacity commentary.

current_claims.claim: Azure AI demand remains a key driver to verify against primary company materials.

upcoming_catalysts.title: Next quarterly earnings materials
upcoming_catalysts.expected_timing: Unavailable in local fixture; verify manually.

manual_review_items: Verify latest earnings date from Microsoft investor relations.
Check most recent 10-Q and earnings transcript for AI capacity spending, Azure growth, and margin commentary.
Add contradictory evidence if growth or margin language weakened.

tickers.watch_reason: Monitor data center demand, supply constraints, margin commentary, and customer concentration.

changes.summary: Sample fixture keeps data center demand as the primary research focus.
changes.why_it_may_matter: Demand durability, supply constraints, and customer mix can change revenue quality and risk context.
changes.evidence_text: Use company earnings materials, filings, and transcript commentary to verify data center demand and margin claims.

current_claims.claim: AI accelerator demand remains strong, but this fixture claim needs primary-source verification.

upcoming_catalysts.title: Next quarterly earnings materials
upcoming_catalysts.expected_timing: Unavailable in local fixture; verify manually.

manual_review_items: Verify latest earnings date from NVIDIA investor relations.
Compare data center growth commentary with supply, margin, and customer concentration risks.
Look for any primary-source evidence that weakens the demand claim.

tickers.watch_reason: Monitor commercial AI platform adoption, government contract commentary, and valuation context.

changes.summary: Sample fixture flags commercial AI platform adoption as a research item to verify.
changes.why_it_may_matter: Commercial adoption quality can affect revenue durability, margin mix, and valuation debate.
changes.evidence_text: Use company earnings materials, filings, and contract disclosures to verify commercial AI platform adoption.

current_claims.claim: Commercial AI platform adoption is improving, but this fixture claim is not verified.

manual_review_items: Verify latest earnings date from Palantir investor relations.
Separate commercial AI platform adoption evidence from broad market hype.
Review valuation context and counterarguments before escalating to deeper research.
